description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this black backpack from adidas. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it's sure to accommodate everything you need.Height: 42 cmWidth: 38 cmDepth: 15 cmMade of polyester for enhanced durabilityTwo roomy compartments with an insert pocketBrand name with the adidas patented 3-Stripes printed on the frontHaul loop for handling easePadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyBranded zippers and sliders for easy useCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
